query:
SELECT 
  a.id,
  a.demandId,
  a.workerId,
  w.name as workerName,
  d.date,
  d.startTime,
  d.endTime,
  d.breakHours,
  a.actualStart,
  a.actualEnd,
  a.scheduledHours,
  a.actualHours,
  a.varianceHours,
  a.status
FROM assignments a
JOIN workers w ON a.workerId = w.id
JOIN demands d ON a.demandId = d.id
WHERE a.workerId = 330087
ORDER BY d.date DESC
LIMIT 10;
